title: Raging Perspective LIVE w/ Jessica Tarlov & Aaron Parnas
summary:
Join Jessica Tarlov and Aaron Parnas (@aaronparnas1) for Raging Perspective: the weekly politics live show, keeping you informed with all the latest news — and not holding back when it makes us rage.

To see Raging Perspective LIVE, and to get ad-free episodes of Raging Moderates and all the other Prof G shows: join ProfG+ on Substack: https://ragingmoderates.profgmedia.com/
